# holistics_data_alert (Resource)

A Holistics data alert that fires when a metric meets a condition.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Email alert — fire when revenue drops below 1000.
resource "holistics_data_alert" "revenue_drop" {
  title       = "Revenue dropped below threshold"
  source_type = "DashboardWidget"
  source_id   = "5678"

  schedule = {
    repeat = "*/15 * * * *"
    paused = false
  }

  dynamic_filter_presets = []

  viz_conditions = [
    {
      field_path = { field_name = "revenue" }
      condition = {
        operator = "less_than"
        values   = ["1000"]
      }
    }
  ]

  email_dest = {
    title      = "Revenue alert"
    recipients = ["oncall@example.com"]
    options    = { body_text = "Revenue dipped below the threshold. Check the dashboard for details." }
  }
}

# Slack alert — fire when BOTH conditions hold (high error rate AND low traffic).
resource "holistics_data_alert" "anomaly_slack" {
  title       = "Anomaly: low traffic with high errors"
  source_type = "DashboardWidget"
  source_id   = "5678"

  schedule = {
    repeat = "*/30 * * * *"
    paused = false
  }

  dynamic_filter_presets = []

  viz_conditions = [
    {
      field_path  = { field_name = "error_rate" }
      aggregation = "avg"
      condition = {
        operator = "greater_than"
        values   = ["0.05"]
      }
    },
    {
      field_path  = { field_name = "request_count" }
      aggregation = "sum"
      condition = {
        operator = "less_than"
        values   = ["100"]
      }
    }
  ]

  slack_dest = {
    title   = "Traffic anomaly"
    message = "Error rate is up while traffic is down — investigate."
    slack_channels = [
      { id = "C123456" }
    ]
  }
}

# Webhook alert — page on stale data via PagerDuty Events API.
resource "holistics_data_alert" "stale_data_pagerduty" {
  title       = "Critical: data freshness SLA breach"
  source_type = "VizBlock"
  source_id   = "freshness-block-uuid"

  schedule = {
    repeat = "*/5 * * * *"
    paused = false
  }

  dynamic_filter_presets = []

  viz_conditions = [
    {
      field_path = { field_name = "minutes_since_last_update" }
      condition = {
        operator = "greater_than"
        values   = ["60"]
      }
    }
  ]

  webhook_dest = {
    endpoint = "https://events.pagerduty.com/integration/abc123/enqueue"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dynamic_filter_presets` (Attributes List) Dynamic filter presets (use an empty list `[]` if none). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets))
- `schedule` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule))
- `source_id` (String) ID of the alert source (DashboardWidget or VizBlock).
- `source_type` (String) Source type.

### Optional

- `email_dest` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email_dest))
- `slack_dest` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--slack_dest))
- `title` (String)
- `viz_conditions` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--viz_conditions))
- `webhook_dest` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--webhook_dest))

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_filter_presets`

Required:

- `dynamic_filter_id` (String) Dynamic filter ID (numeric or string).
- `preset_condition` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets--preset_condition))

Optional:

- `public_hidden` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets--preset_condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_filter_presets.preset_condition`

Required:

- `operator` (String)

Optional:

- `modifier` (String)
- `values` (List of String)



<a id="nestedatt--schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule`

Required:

- `paused` (Boolean) Pause execution.
- `repeat` (String) Crontab expression (e.g. `0 4 * * *`).

Read-Only:

- `is_archived` (Boolean) True if paused because the source was archived.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Import a data alert by its integer ID.
terraform import holistics_data_alert.revenue_drop 91
```
